office_does: A state representative writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: A twelve-term incumbent focused on tax and budget restraint faces a port commissioner emphasizing permitting, regional industries, and contractor accountability.

candidates.summary: Orcutt is a twelve-term state representative and Finance Committee leader advocating taxpayer protection and budgeting within existing revenue.
highlights: Supports taxpayer protection and existing-revenue budgeting [S1]
Supports property rights, natural-resource jobs, and agency responsiveness [S1]

spending.basis: He explicitly supports budgeting within existing revenue.

experience.basis: He is a twelve-term legislator with senior finance and audit committee roles.

candidates.summary: Jones is a port commissioner, trades worker, Army veteran, and transportation-board chair focused on permitting and industrial jobs.
highlights: Supports permitting reform and local timber, shipping, and construction jobs [S1]
Reports port work on contractor accountability and worker safety [S1]

experience.basis: He combines elected port and regional-board experience with outsider status in the Legislature.
